name: Paradise Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all crust ingredients. Press into bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
2. Combine all cheese layer ingredients.
3. Pour over the crust.
4. Combine all pumpkin layer ingredients.
5. Pour over the cream cheese layer.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1.5 hours or until set.
7. Combine topping ingredients.
8. Pour over the top and put back in the oven.
9. Bake for 5 to 10 minutes.
